title: Source allow-list schema + licensing-gate + cancer-guardrail + no-proprietary policy
context: An open, source-linked map of the Ewing Sarcoma research ecosystem (organizations, grants/awards, research efforts, aggregate registered-study records, and public outputs). Before any source is touched, the project needs a source allow-list schema plus a binding licensing gate and cancer/no-proprietary guardrail. Binding cancer guardrails: open-access / aggregate / organization-/award-level data ONLY -- no controlled-access (dbGaP, EGA), no individual-level biobank/clinical data, no identifiable patient data; proprietary research-intelligence databases (Dimensions/WoS/Scopus/Candid) are out of scope; no medical advice or clinical interpretation. See PLAN.md.
objective: Define the sources/allowlist.yml schema and the licensing-gate policy that categorically rejects patient-level/controlled-access data and proprietary research-intelligence databases, with per-access-channel rights verification and anti-laundering controls.
acceptanceCriteria: sources/allowlist.yml schema defines: name, custodian, URL/API, format, license + license URL, redistribution terms, attribution string, refresh cadence, and status: approved|rejected|pending.

Policy categorically rejects (a) any patient-level/controlled-access data and (b) proprietary research-intelligence databases; anti-laundering controls (record-level citations, contributor attestation, proprietary-distinctive-field spot-checks) are specified.
Per-access-channel rights-verification requirement documented ('open record' != 'open API terms').
output: sources/allowlist.schema.(yml|json) plus docs/licensing-policy.md defining the allow-list schema, licensing gate, cancer guardrail, and no-proprietary policy, committed via PR.
